title: MagicEdenActivity
description: A marketplace activity event on Magic Eden (sale, listing, bid, transfer, etc.).

source.description: Marketplace source of the activity (e.g., magic_eden).

tokenMint.description: Mint address of the NFT involved in the activity.

collection.description: Collection symbol the NFT belongs to.

collectionSymbol.description: Unique collection symbol on Magic Eden.

slot.description: Solana slot number when the activity occurred.

blockTime.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the activity was confirmed on-chain.

buyer.description: Wallet address of the buyer (for sale and bid events).

seller.description: Wallet address of the seller (for sale and list events).

price.description: Transaction price in SOL or native currency.

currency.description: Currency details if the transaction used a non-native SPL token.
